content.en:
Tuta's battle tower is divided into ninety-nine eighty-one layers, and you can get a key fragment for each floor you break through, but almost all of them are ordinary key fragments.

It is said that the higher the number of floors you have passed, the higher the chance of obtaining Key Fragment 1 and Key Fragment 2.

Of course, there is no reward for breaking through the subsequent layers and breaking again, and you can only receive the reward once.

Ye Tian directly applied for the Breaking Combat Power Tower.

On the first floor of the Battle Tower, Ye Tian came here, and one after another figures appeared.

The strength of these figures is not weak, it is equivalent to the top half-step Eternal Master, and the number is just a bit large.

This layer can be regarded as a benefit, and any Eternal Master can break through, after all, the Eternal Master can easily slaughter a group of half-step Eternal Masters.

Ye Tian didn't bother at all, he directly crushed with his breath, smashed these half-step Eternal Controllers, and broke through the first layer of the Battle Power Tower.

Just after breaking through, a key fragment emerges.

"Key Fragment 288!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This can only be considered an ordinary key fragment, but a key fragment for white is not bad.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to break through the Battle Force Tower.

On the second layer, there is only one figure here, and the strength is equivalent to the weakest eternal master, so the weaker first-domain level controllers can defeat it, unless it is a domain-level controller whose strength is too poor, and the strength is equal to that of the upper and lower levels, then there is no way to defeat it.

But for Ye Tian, the difficulty of the second layer was still very low.

He instantly killed the opponent of the second layer and broke through the second layer.

Then came the third, fourth, and fifth floors......

The number of layers that Ye Tian broke through was getting higher and higher, and he gradually broke through to the fortieth floor.

Basically, without the strength of the first realm, it is impossible to break through the fortieth layer at all.

Forty floors.

Ye Tian fought with a master whose strength was close to that of a realm-level, the speed of both sides was extremely fast, every blow pierced through time and space, and ordinary attacks were many times more powerful than the nine-domain level controller's full use of space-time control techniques.

Time and space here are constantly collapsing, and it seems that there is no winner or loser.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian used the Origin Control Technique - Flame Explosion!

Bang!!!!

With a single blow, the power of the flame explosion shattered layers of time and space, and also severely damaged the opponent of the fortieth layer.

Soon, Ye Tian broke through the fortieth floor.

Wow!

A key fragment fell in front of Ye Tian.

"Key Six Fragments!"

Ye Tian put it away, without any surprises.

Forty-first floor.

Ye Tian fought with his opponent at this level for a long time, and the endless time and space were shattered, and the body under his control was cracked countless times, and he fought for a long time before finally defeating the opponent at the cost of serious injuries.

And this layer is also Ye Tian's limit.

He couldn't break through the forty-second floor for the time being.

On the forty-second floor, the key fragment that Ye Tian obtained was the thirteenth key fragment, and its value was average.

"The Tower of Combat Power can no longer obtain key fragments for the time being, so let's leave first. "

Ye Tian left the Battle Power Tower.

The time and space of the beast has not been opened for the time being, so he is ready to go to another level of Tuta - Fog Exploration.

Mist exploration is an ingredient with a bit of gambling, because if you want to enter the fog exploration, you must pay a key fragment, and after paying, you can enter the level of fog exploration to explore the fog area.

This misty area is a special time and space, which was built by the old man of Guishan, and the rules in it were naturally created by the old man of Guishan.

Once you enter the Misty Exploration Area, your perception will be greatly limited, and no secret arts, exploration, or other means will be able to detect how far away.

There is a Void Mist Beast in the Misty Zone, which was also created by the old man of Guishan, and it cannot be killed in the Misty Exploration Zone, but there is a treasure chest hanging on their bodies, as long as they can catch the Void Mist Beast, they can obtain the treasure chest on their body, open the treasure chest, and take the key fragments in their treasure chest.

"I wonder if this level of Mist Adventure will restrict the copying talent? If there is no restriction on the copying talent, I may be able to use the copying talent to detect the Void Mist Beasts, so that I can easily find the Void Mist Beasts and get the treasure chests on them. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, there is a time limit for entering the fog to explore, and when the time comes, it will be moved, and you are only allowed to enter at most once in a 10,000 realm river year.

Ye Tian handed over a key fragment and was immediately sent into the misty exploration time and space by Tuta.

......

Airplanes!

Ye Tian came to a misty exploration time and space, the mist here is not the same as the mist area between the Eternal Realm and the Boundary River, and even the Eternal Controller will be affected in the mist area here.

Basically, if you don't surpass the old man of Kameyama in strength, you can't break the rules of the misty exploration area.

"Let's see if copying talent is restricted by the rules here. "

Ye Tian immediately urged the copying talent.

Airplanes!

The fluctuations of the copying talent spread out, and although it was suppressed, it was not very suppressed.

"Sure enough, the old man of Guishan couldn't completely suppress the copying talent. "

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

In this way, he is almost like an open presence in the Misty Exploration Area!

Immediately.

He began to use his copying talent here to find the Void Mist.

Ye Tian shuttled through the mist exploration area at an extremely fast speed, and soon the copying talent helped him find a Void Mist Beast.

The Void Mist Beast is not strong, and it may not even be as powerful as a domain-level master, but it is inherently integrated with the Mist Exploration Area, and it cannot be killed.

The other Eternal Masters don't have the ability of him, and entering here is completely dependent on luck, and it is even possible that a Void Mist Beast will not be able to find it.

If you can't find the Void Mist Beast, you won't be able to get the treasure chest, and then your income will be zero, which is a loss.

Only if you find a Void Mist Beast and catch it and get the treasure chest, you don't lose money.

This Void Mist Beast sensed Ye Tian's arrival and wanted to escape, but it couldn't hide it at all.

Ye Tian came to its side in an instant, grabbed it with one hand, took the treasure chest on its body, and then let it go.

"Treasure chest, open!"

Ye Tian opened the treasure chest, and there was a key fragment inside.

"Key 79 shards!"

Ye Tian put away this key fragment and immediately continued to look for other Void Mist Beasts.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find another Void Mist Beast, snatch its treasure chest, and obtain the No. 39 key fragment.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to search for the Void Mist Beast and obtained one key fragment after another.

Such a gain is enough to leave any Eternal Master dumbfounded.

Time passed slowly, and the key fragments on Ye Tian's body gradually accumulated to more than 1,000, but he still did not find the first key fragment and the second key fragment.

Finally, after obtaining the 5,000th key fragment, he finally had a big catch.
